title: TCW1: Echo On Fran
description:
For Time - 21-15-9

Thrusters (135, 95lb)
C2B Pull-ups
Cal Echo Bike

title: TCW2: The Ski Erg Shootout (M)
description:
For Time
Waterfall-style

21/18 Cal Ski Erg
40ft Unbroken HS Walk Slalom Course
7 ErgShoot Shot Attempts

Goal: 20 Successful Target Hits

*First team to clear all 4 targets or leads at cap

*Next athlete released to Ski Erg once athlete finishes

title: TCW2: The Ski Erg Shootout (F)
description:
For Time

7 ErgShoot Shot Attempts

*Next athlete released to Ski Erg once athlete finishes

title: TCW3: The Oly Show (Lift)
description:
For Total Combined Load (All 4)

1M & 1F - 1RM Snatch
1M & 1F - 1RM C&J

For Fastest Total Combined Time (All 4)

1M & 1F - Isabel
1M & 1F - Grace

description:

title: TCW4A : The Four-Leg Relay
description:
For Total Time

ATH 1 - 300 meter Open Water Swim
ATH 2 - 3,000 / 2,400 meter Ski Erg
ATH 3 - 4,000 / 3,200 meter Echo Row
ATH 4 - 4,000 meter Beach Run

title: TCW4B: The Four-Leg Relay (B)
description:
For Total Time

ATH 1 - 300 meter Open Water Swim
ATH 2 - 3,000 / 2,400 meter Ski Erg
ATH 3 - 4,000 / 3,200 meter Echo Row
ATH 4 - 4,000 meter Beach Run

title: TCW5 : Min to Max
description:
For Time

90 T2B
45 Strict Wall-Facing HSPU
30 Ring Muscle-ups

*Alternating minutes per teammate

title: TCW6: Uphill Battle (A)
description:
For Time

Alternating M/F Pairs
1-2-3-4-5-6-7
Partner Deadlifts (405lb)
Partner Bar Facing Burpees

Into, All 4...
28 Team Deadlifts (715lb)
28 Team Bar Facing Burpees

title: TCW8: Sandy Delivery 2.0 (A)
description:
2 Rounds For Time

Buy In: 10 Burpees Over the Log

Team Delivers 7,500+ lb of Gear
Across the Beach

Rest 1 minute

*Athletes will wear a 5.11 Vest

title: TCW7: Workout 7 (B)
description:
Head to Head Style
Each Match-up For Time


F1 v F1 & M1 v M1
3 Rope Climbs
Alt DB Snatch - 12 x 70/50lb, 10 x 80/55lb, 8 x 90/60lb


F2 v F2 & M2 v M2
3 Rope Climbs
Alt DB Snatch - 10 x 80/55lb, 8 x 90/60lb, 6 x 100/70lb
